_comment: Edit this file to customise how tables and columns are described to the LLM. Reload cell 10 after saving.

table_aliases._comment: Map a substring of the table name to a friendly display name shown in charts and used as the 'source' value in UNION ALL comparisons.

ref_area.description: Country or region ISO 3-letter code (e.g. AUS, KOR, USA, FIN, BRA). Use this for filtering by country.

reference_area.description: Full country or region name (e.g. Australia, Korea, United States, Finland). Label column paired with ref_area.

time_period.description: Year of the observation (integer, e.g. 1970, 2015, 2020). Use this for time-series analysis.

obs_value.description: Numeric indicator value — the main metric used for aggregation (e.g. percentage of GDP).

measure.description: OECD indicator code (e.g. P31PS13 = Social transfers in kind). Use measure_1 for the readable label.

measure_1.description: Readable label for the measure code (e.g. 'Social transfers in kind'). Paired with measure.

unit_measure.description: Unit code for obs_value (e.g. PT_B1GQ = Percentage of GDP, XDC = national currency).

unit_of_measure.description: Readable label for the unit (e.g. 'Percentage of GDP'). Paired with unit_measure.

freq.description: Frequency code of the observation (A = Annual).

frequency_of_observation.description: Readable frequency label (e.g. 'Annual'). Paired with freq.

sector.description: Institutional sector code (e.g. S13 = General government, S14 = Households).

institutional_sector.description: Readable label for the sector (e.g. 'General government'). Paired with sector.

expenditure_1.description: Readable label for expenditure type (e.g. 'Total'). Paired with expenditure.

chapter.description: OECD chapter code (e.g. NAAG_VI = Part VI: General Government).

chapter_1.description: Readable label for the chapter (e.g. 'Part VI: General Government'). Paired with chapter.

transaction.description: Transaction code (e.g. D63 = Social transfers in kind).

transaction_1.description: Readable label for the transaction (e.g. 'Social transfers in kind'). Paired with transaction.

obs_status.description: Observation status code (A = Normal value, E = Estimated, P = Provisional).

unit_mult.description: Unit multiplier exponent (0 = Units, 3 = Thousands, 6 = Millions).

source.description: Dataset label added in UNION ALL cross-dataset comparisons. Values are the table aliases defined above (e.g. 'Dataset A', 'Dataset B').
